subcodes.title: Words to some Zoroastrian Bahá’ís, spoken on 1914-05-06
subcodes.first_line: The more union and agreement appear amongst the believers of God the greater will be the divine Confirmations, the more uninterrupted will be the descent ... The cause of God is like unto a college. The believers are like unto the students.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @bringing forth results; fruit, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
